flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 25% at SUNY at Fredonia vs the 2018–2022 baseline (2.9k vs 3.8k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at SUNY at Fredonia fell 22% between 2021 and 2024 (3.5k → 2.8k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at SUNY at Fredonia fell 22% between 2021 and 2024 (47.4% → 37.2%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at SUNY at Fredonia rose 15% between 2006 and 2009 ($5.4k → $6.3k).
